summary: Short 2-4 sentence summary of what this card teaches.
key_points: Important definition, rule, formula, or fact.
A useful exam-related point only if it is provided in the source image.
main_text: Exact extracted text of the main paragraphs from the source image.
other_details: Any side note shown in the page margin or edge of the book.
Other useful parts visible in the image but not part of the main paragraph.
